title: Can I Have A Cigarette?
description: Adds two types of craftable cigarettes.
body:
### New Items: - Cigarette, can be consumed. Gives an effect that makes the player unable to walk for a 20 seconds. It also lowers attack speed. - Crack Cigarette, can be consumed. Gives the player a speed + jump boost and significantly raises attack speed for a minute and a half. - Roach, will be added to the player's inventory after consuming a cigarette. Four of them can be used to craft one cigarette. There is no variant for the crack cigarette. ### Recipes: 6 Paper + 3 Dried Kelp
![6 Paper + 3 Dried Kelp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3f260c77463fccd29574ba36e43c1f7b36891f8.png)
6 Paper + 2 Dried Kelp + 1 Beetroot Seeds
![6 Paper + 2 Dried Kelp + 1 Beetroot Seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557e5a50a54d816933b5330087a1f5f647ac541f.png)
4 Roaches
![4 Roaches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56f92bb609de64f8fd4a24f35403c13fa7cb16a.png)
